ogTitle: Police Point vs Pontypool: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Police Point and Pontypool.
heading: Police Point vs Pontypool — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Police Point, Tasmania and Pontypool, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pontypool has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Police Point (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Police Point or Pontypool safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Police Point has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Pontypool scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Police Point scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Pontypool scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Police Point or Pontypool?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pontypool has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
